title: `npm ci` fails with EBADPLATFORM on openharmony optional dep
Sort citation network by FWCI
resolution: Added FWCI + percentile sort; `fwci`/`citation_normalized_percentile` added to `LIST_SELECT`

title: Non-DOI identifier fallback (PMID, arXiv)
resolution: Full identifier chain: DOI → PMID → arXiv (Extra/archiveID/URL) → ISBN; `extractIdentifier()` shared across all layers

title: ISBN support for books
resolution: `getWorkByISBN` added; zero-citation suppression in columns and pane; book/bookSection handled gracefully

title: AJG rankings out of date (2021 edition)
resolution: Rebuilt from master-journals.csv: 3177 journals, AJG 2024 edition, column renamed "AJG '24"

title: ABDC rankings — 2025/2026 edition expected
resolution: ABDC 2025 edition now bundled (2684 journals); column renamed "ABDC '25"

title: `isBookType` duplicated in two modules
resolution: Extracted to `utils.ts`; `citationColumn.ts` + `citationPane.ts` both import it (confirmed deduped 2026-06-08)

title: Citation network dialog hard-gated on DOI despite multi-identifier resolver
resolution: Dialog + menu now share `canResolveWork`/`resolveWorkForItem`; browser opens for PMID/arXiv/ISBN/confirmed-match items. Citing/reference queries already ran off the OpenAlex work id, not a DOI — the gate was an unnecessary limitation (the 2026-04-09 audit's "genuinely needs a DOI" assumption was wrong)

title: `FetchResult` is not a proper discriminated union
resolution: Now a status-tagged union (`{ status: "ok" | "cached" | "error" | "suggestion" }`) in `citationService.ts`; callers narrow on `status`. Landed with the title-match suggestion branch (v2.0.1)

title: Metadata-based matching for items without a recognized identifier
resolution: Title+year search (`searchByMetadata`/`attemptTitleSearch`) with confidence-tiered confirm/dismiss card and DOI graduation on confirm; redesigned card shipped v2.0.1 (#36)

title: Citation-network membership + collection filing keyed on DOI, not work id
resolution: Re-keyed library-membership and collection filing on the OpenAlex work id. Dedup: getAllCachedOpenAlexIds() + existingWorkIds in NetworkState, so DOI-less results already in library no longer render as "+ Add" and create silent duplicates. Filing: resolveLibraryItem() resolves the item via createdItemIds → cached-work-id reverse lookup → DOI search, so the File button works for DOI-less items; itemCollections re-keyed by work id. Added Zotero.Items.getIDFromLibraryAndKey typing.
